Intraday post (02/June)

Still in hospital…

Here I code today’s positioning:

The overall net speed profile is positive, locally above the centroid it is sharply negative. The centroid is at 5852.87; this is a key lvl both dynamically both sentiment-wise. A close below would shift the dsitribution towards more bearish.To the downside 5837.81 - 5827.77 is the key zone.To the upside, vol should calm down above 5893.24While the trend in anxious, I don’t see inherent bearishness right now, rather a consolidation. What I see is that the more the price action approaches the downside zone, the more deltas MMs will need to buy today, as the notional size of their put inventories skewed towards long puts.

OptionsDepth Heatmap:

(Description is here)

Coding 5885 - 5848 as the primal range where I would primarly look for mean reversion trading. However, if you printed well last week and before, it is better to wait this week to see how macro unfolds.
